reason: Successfully navigated to the agent, sent a math question, and verified the agent responded with the correct answer.
steps: Navigated to http://localhost:47891 — Page loaded successfully, showing the Gamut app with sidebar containing multiple agents.
Found the "QA-20260708-015141-qe1b" agent in the sidebar — Agent was visible in the "Your Agents" section with status "idle".
Clicked on the "QA-20260708-015141-qe1b" agent — Successfully navigated to the agent page; agent page loaded with the agent name and status indicator showing "idle".
Verified agent status is "running" or "idle" — Agent status confirmed as "idle", which is one of the required states.
Sent message "Hello! What is 2+2?" to the agent — Message was typed into the message input field and submitted using the Send button.
Waited up to 3 minutes for a response — Agent responded within 1 second with the message processed and status indicator showing "Worked for 1s".
Verified the response mentions "4" — Agent response clearly shows "4" as the answer to the math question. Screenshot captured showing the complete conversation.
